narrative:
Precinct Holloway Village (precinct in Belmont County) has 173 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.2 percentage points.
